title: Hode Marble Sticky Back Plastic 30cm X 2m Granite White Grey Vinyl Wrap Contact Paper Self Adhesive Wallpaper Waterproof PVC Roll for Kitchen Countertop Furniture Easy to Remove
features: SIZE: 30cm×2m, 11.8 X 78.7inches. Material: PVC. Quality upgrade, thicken. Compared to before, we increased the brightness of the paper. High quality and realistic marble effects will make you innovate very well
FEATURES: Waterproof. Good stickiness. Simple and comfortable. And this paper is easy to remove. Just peel it off slowly. No damage to the furniture
EASY TO USE: Self-adhesive, no glue required. The backing paper has grid lines. Just peel off and paste. Cut the size you want. Own new furniture simply and quickly
APPLICATION: Suitable for most smooth surface, kitchen counter, furniture, dresser, crafts, table, bookcase, door and wall

TIMELY REPLY: We are committed to responding to your questions 24/7. Marble wallpaper you have any questions, don’t hesitate to send us a message! It can not only innovate furniture, but also improve the quality of life. Have it, have a new life
description: Product Description Create A New Home Environment Marble Peel and Stick Wallpaper by Hode Waterproof You can use it with confidence in places such as the kitchen or bathroom Easy to Clean Simply use a damp cloth to easily wipe it clean Thickening More wear-resistant, less prone to wrinkles, and won't see the color of the platform under the wallpaper Strong Adhesion Stickiness is more durable and won't easily peel off Application Previous page Next page 1 Worktop vinyl covering 2 Wallpaper for livingroom 3 Kitchen wallpaper 4 Bathroom wallpaper How to Use Can it be used for wooden countertop and then be removed easily ? Our contact paper can be use on most flat surface. It is suitable for pasting on wooden countertop. It can be easily removed without leaving any traces when you don't want it. How about the stickiness? Will it fall off Our wallpaper can be firmly adhered to the surface of objects. If you are worried about falling, you can use a hair dryer to heat it before use Can I use it outdoors Our wallpaper can be used outdoors, it is waterproof and stain resistant. Even when used outdoors, it will not fade Marble effect Marble Series Products Self adhesive Oil proof Water proof Self adhesive Oil proof Water proof Self adhesive Oil proof Water proof Self adhesive Oil proof Water proof Previous page Stick on mirrors for wall Learn More Black and white marble Learn More Light grey marble Learn More Dark grey marble Learn More Next page
